title: Fix CI failure: daemon empty response
description: Resolve CI failing scenario 'Daemon client reports empty responses' in Python behave.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

custom.beads_close_reason: Fixed empty response daemon test timing and verified scenario passes.
custom.beads_notes: Adjusted empty-response daemon test to keep server alive long enough to receive the request before closing, so client reads empty response reliably. Ran behave scenario for daemon_error_handling feature with name filter; scenario passes.
